title: ROME — Colosseum + gelato
prompt: @young_Papa and @young_Mama walking arm-in-arm in front of the Roman Colosseum. Each holds a small gelato cone in their free hand. Pink-strawberry cone for her, pistachio-green for him. Mouth SMILES wide, tongue LICKS the gelato cone, eyes SPARKLE. Right hand EXTENDS the pistachio cone offering. Mouth LAUGHS, leans in and takes a tiny lick. young_Papa (playful): "Best gelato in Roma!"
